infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CitiVoice needs your location to pin your concern on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: CitiVoice needs your location to pin your concern on the map.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The app needs access to your gallery to upload concern photos.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The app needs access to your camera to take concern photos.
